summary: Server-side market screener over the 50-symbol catalog: a pure, tested scan engine (apps/api/src/scanner.ts) computes real last-closed-bar indicator metrics (RSI, EMA distance %, ATR %, RVOL, % change, volume) from the ingestion CandleStore via @supercharts/indicators computeAll, and evaluates filters by reusing the existing SignalCondition union + signal-eval.ts evaluateConditionSet verbatim (presets = canned SignalCondition sets: Oversold, Overbought, Breakout, Volume surge, MA cross). New POST /api/scanner/scan route with per-symbol honest status (ok / insufficient_data / unavailable — venues without candles are never faked), TTL cache + in-flight coalescing, concurrency-capped backfill mirroring the alert-engine pattern. The right-rail Scanner tab becomes a real screener: sortable metric columns, preset chips, timeframe selector, click-to-open-symbol, 30s auto-refresh with manual refresh and last-updated stamp, explicit loading/error/empty states, plus a compact custom-condition builder with saved screens, and a stretch PulseScript mode that runs a saved script's last-bar alert()/mark across every symbol under the interpreter's existing timeout/maxBars caps. 4 one-session increments, each ADD-only — top-movers endpoint, live alerts, and Telegram config untouched.
architecture: **Data flow (all real candles, no fabrication):** POST /api/scanner/scan { interval, universe: 'catalog' | { watchlistId } | { symbols[] }, preset? | { conditions: SignalCondition[], logic, indicatorSpecs: IndicatorInstance[] } } → for each symbol: ensure N bars (new apps/api/src/candle-window.ts `ensureBars(ctx, symbol, interval, want)` — copies the proven pattern from apps/api/src/alert-engine.ts:413-439: ctx.candleStore.query → provider.fetchHistoricalCandles fallback → upsert; concurrency-capped at ~6 in-flight, per-venue; NEVER modifies alert-engine itself) → drop the still-forming last bar (closeTime > Date.now()) so scan semantics match the closed-bar alert engine → pure `runScan()` in new apps/api/src/scanner.ts computes the fixed metric-column set via computeAll() from @supercharts/indicators/runner (rsi.value, ema(21) distance % derived as (close-ema)/ema*100, atr.value + atr% of close, rvol.value, N-bar %change, volume, close) and evaluates match via evaluateConditionSet() from apps/api/src/signal-eval.ts (metadata via setIndicatorMetadata, refs via collectIndicatorRefs — bit-identical to alerts/MT5). Response: one row per universe symbol { symbol, status: 'ok'|'insufficient_data'|'unavailable', bars, metrics: Record<columnId, number|null>, matched: boolean } + { scannedAt, interval, matchedCount, total }. Full-universe rows (48-50) ship to the client so sorting/filtering is instant client-side; a symbol whose venue returns no candles gets status 'unavailable' and renders a badge, never a number. Route file apps/api/src/routes/scanner.ts (zod-validated, registered in apps/api/src/main.ts next to marketRoutes at line 217; the existing GET /api/scanner/top-movers in routes/market.ts stays untouched as the Movers view). Scan results cached per (interval, universe-hash, screen-hash) with 20s TTL + in-flight promise coalescing (same pattern as topMovers, market.ts:320-362). **Presets** live in apps/api/src/scan-presets.ts as plain { name, conditions, logic, indicatorSpecs } objects — e.g. Oversold = indicator_compare rsi.value < 30; MA cross = indicator_compare ema9.value crosses_above right:{kind:'indicator', ema21.value}; Breakout = price_crosses close crosses_above target:{kind:'indicator', donchian.upper}; Volume surge = indicator_compare rvol.value > 2 — pure data, zero new evaluator code. **Saved screens:** scanner_screens table in apps/api/src/db.ts + per-user CRUD in routes/scanner.ts, mirroring routes/scripts.ts exactly (getUser() demo stub is fine; auth lands later per the launch-blocker plan). **PulseScript mode (stretch):** apps/api/src/pulse-scan.ts runs runScript(source, bars, { timeoutMs: 500, maxBars: 2000 }) per symbol from @supercharts/script-lang; a symbol matches when the script raised alert() or emitted a mark on the final closed bar; each plot's last value becomes an extra dynamic column; per-symbol RuntimeError/ParseError (line/col) is returned as that row's status — one bad symbol never poisons the scan. Script source resolves from the existing user_scripts table via its id. **Web:** extract the Scanner tab out of the 1041-line right-rail.tsx into apps/web/features/terminal/scanner-tab.tsx + pure scanner-tab-util.ts (sort comparators, metric formatting, column defs — unit-tested like data-window-util.ts); right-rail.tsx keeps only `<ScannerTab onPick={...} />`. UI: view switcher (Movers = existing endpoint | Screen | Pulse), preset chips (chipCls pattern from NewsTab), interval pills reusing INTERVALS from interval-selector.tsx, sortable column headers (client-side, tabular-nums, bull/bear coloring via existing formatPercent/formatPrice/formatCompact from @/lib/format), row click → onPick(symbol) → setPaneSymbol (already wired), matched-first ordering with unmatched rows collapsed under a '42 more scanned' expander, auto-refresh 30s + manual RefreshCw button + 'Updated Xs ago' stamp, Skeleton rows while loading, error state with Retry button (NewsTab empty-state pattern), honest empty state ('0 of 48 matched · scanned 46, 2 unavailable'). Custom builder: scan-builder.tsx renders compact condition rows (indicator select from INDICATOR_REGISTRY, channel select from spec.channels, operator, constant/price/indicator right-hand) emitting SignalCondition[] + IndicatorInstance[] specs via pure scan-builder-util.ts (fresh nanoid instance ids, validation).

increments.title: INC-1 — Scan engine + POST /api/scanner/scan (server, pure core, presets)
increments.scope: CREATE apps/api/src/scanner.ts (pure `runScan(candlesBySymbol, request)`: metric columns via computeAll from @supercharts/indicators/runner; match via evaluateConditionSet/collectIndicatorRefs/setIndicatorMetadata from ../signal-eval; closed-bar trim; per-symbol status ok/insufficient_data/unavailable). CREATE apps/api/src/scan-presets.ts (oversold/overbought/breakout/volume-surge/ma-cross as canned SignalCondition+IndicatorInstance data). CREATE apps/api/src/candle-window.ts (ensureBars: candleStore.query → provider.fetchHistoricalCandles fallback → upsert, concurrency cap 6 — copied from alert-engine.ts:413-439, alert-engine NOT touched). CREATE apps/api/src/routes/scanner.ts (POST /api/scanner/scan zod-validated + GET /api/scanner/presets; 20s TTL cache + in-flight coalescing per market.ts topMovers pattern). MODIFY apps/api/src/main.ts (register scannerRoutes(app, db, ingestion) beside marketRoutes ~line 217). CREATE tests/scanner.test.ts (~10 cases: RSI-oversold matches synthetic bars, EMA-distance derived metric, still-forming bar excluded, empty-candles symbol → 'unavailable', short history → 'insufficient_data', preset shapes evaluate, indicatorSpecs override defaults).
increments.verify: pnpm vitest run tests/scanner.test.ts green + pnpm -F @supercharts/api typecheck clean. Then against the live dev API: curl POST /api/scanner/scan {interval:'1h', preset:'oversold'} → returns one row per catalog symbol; cross-check one symbol's reported RSI by curling /api/candles for the same window and computing rsi() in a node -e one-liner from @supercharts/indicators — values must match to the decimal; confirm an OANDA symbol with no cached candles reports status 'unavailable' with no metrics; confirm GET /api/alerts still lists the 48 live alerts untouched. Commit.

increments.title: INC-2 — Right-rail Scanner tab: real screener UI (columns, sort, presets, refresh, honest states)
increments.scope: CREATE apps/web/features/terminal/scanner-tab.tsx (view switcher Movers|Screen; preset chips; interval pills from INTERVALS in interval-selector.tsx; sortable headers for Last/Chg%/RSI/RVOL/ATR%/EMA-dist; matched-first rows + 'N more scanned' expander; unavailable badge per row; row click → onPick; 30s auto-refresh + manual RefreshCw + 'Updated Xs ago'; Skeleton loading; error+Retry; empty '0 of 48 matched' with scanned/unavailable counts). CREATE apps/web/features/terminal/scanner-tab-util.ts (pure: column defs, sort comparators incl. null-last, formatting glue over @/lib/format). MODIFY apps/web/features/terminal/right-rail.tsx (delete inline ScannerTab lines 580-639, import the new component; Movers view keeps calling the untouched /scanner/top-movers). CREATE tests/scanner-tab-util.test.ts (sort with nulls, matched-first partition, stale-stamp formatting).
increments.verify: pnpm vitest run tests/scanner-tab-util.test.ts green; pnpm -F @supercharts/web typecheck clean. Browser on /terminal (live data): run Oversold on 1h → rows show real RSI values; click a matched row → active pane switches to that symbol (screenshot); click RSI header → sort flips; kill the API process → error state with Retry renders (screenshot), restart API → Retry recovers; Movers view still lists Binance top movers; 0 console errors. Commit.

increments.title: INC-3 — Custom screen builder + saved screens (reuses SignalCondition end-to-end)
increments.scope: CREATE apps/web/features/terminal/scan-builder.tsx (compact condition rows: indicator select from INDICATOR_REGISTRY, channel from spec.channels, operator, right-hand constant/price/indicator; AND/OR logic toggle; emits {conditions, logic, indicatorSpecs}). CREATE apps/web/features/terminal/scan-builder-util.ts (pure: buildInstanceSpecs with fresh nanoid ids, condition validation, preset→builder-state hydration so 'Edit as custom' works). MODIFY apps/api/src/db.ts (scanner_screens table: id, user_id, name, config JSON, timestamps — mirror user_scripts). MODIFY apps/api/src/routes/scanner.ts (per-user GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/scanner/screens, mirroring routes/scripts.ts CRUD incl. empty-name 400). MODIFY scanner-tab.tsx (Save/Open saved screens, loaded-name badge — same UX as the PulseScript editor's Open/Save). CREATE tests/scan-builder-util.test.ts.
increments.verify: pnpm vitest run tests/scan-builder-util.test.ts green; typecheck web+api. API smoke via curl: create→list→get→rename→delete a screen, empty name → 400. Browser: build 'RSI(7) < 25 AND close > EMA(50)' (two conditions, custom lengths), Run → matched rows consistent with per-symbol values shown in columns; Save as 'Dip buyer', full page reload → Open → loads and reruns identically (screenshot). Confirm POST /api/scanner/scan with the builder payload evaluates through signal-eval (add one integration assertion in tests/scanner.test.ts using indicatorSpecs with length 7). Commit.

increments.title: INC-4 (stretch) — PulseScript-powered screen (run a script across the universe)
increments.scope: CREATE apps/api/src/pulse-scan.ts (per symbol: runScript(source, bars, {timeoutMs: 500, maxBars: 2000}) from @supercharts/script-lang; matched = alert() raised or mark emitted on the final closed bar; each plot's last value → dynamic column; ParseError/RuntimeError (line/col) captured as that row's status:'script_error' — never aborts the whole scan). MODIFY apps/api/src/routes/scanner.ts (POST /api/scanner/pulse {scriptId | source, interval, universe}; scriptId resolves via the existing user_scripts table; same TTL cache). MODIFY apps/web/features/terminal/scanner-tab.tsx (Pulse view: saved-script picker from GET /api/scripts, dynamic plot columns, per-symbol error tooltip, matched marker). CREATE tests/pulse-scan.test.ts (crossOver script matches only the synthetic symbol whose last bar crosses; erroring script yields script_error row while siblings scan; timeout abort honored; plot values surface as columns).
increments.verify: pnpm vitest run tests/pulse-scan.test.ts green; typecheck api+web+script-lang. Browser: save a 'pulse 1' script that alerts on EMA(9)×EMA(21) cross, run Pulse scan on 1h across the catalog → matched symbols listed with plot-value columns; open a matched symbol and confirm the same cross is visible on its chart via the Script terminal run (screenshot both); deliberately run a script with a syntax error → per-row 'script error (line N)' rendered, other rows still real; 0 console errors; suite count and 48 live alerts unchanged. Commit + tick CLAUDE.md mission log.

reuse: apps/api/src/signal-eval.ts — evaluateConditionSet / collectIndicatorRefs / SignalCondition union: the ONLY condition engine, shared bit-for-bit with alerts + MT5 runner
packages/indicators/src/runner.ts (computeAll, computeIndicatorChannel, setIndicatorMetadata) + registry.ts (INDICATOR_REGISTRY / INDICATOR_LOOKUP) — all metric math and picker metadata

apps/ingestion/src IngestionContext — candleStore.query/upsert, providers.{binance,oanda,mock}.fetchHistoricalCandles, subscriptions.acquire (ensure-bars pattern copied from apps/api/src/alert-engine.ts:413-439 without modifying it)
packages/types — SYMBOL_CATALOG / getCatalogSymbol / INTERVALS / INTERVAL_MS / Candle / IndicatorInstance / SignalConditionLogic
packages/script-lang — runScript + RunOptions.timeoutMs/maxBars safety caps + RunResult.alerts/marks/plots (Pulse mode)
apps/api/src/routes/scripts.ts CRUD shape + user_scripts table pattern (for scanner_screens persistence) and apps/api/src/routes/market.ts topMovers TTL-cache + in-flight coalescing pattern

apps/web: right-rail.tsx onPick→setPaneSymbol wiring, @/lib/api client, @/lib/format (formatPrice/formatPercent/formatCompact/formatRelativeTime), Skeleton/Badge/Tabs primitives, interval-selector.tsx INTERVALS, NewsTab loading/error/empty-state patterns
GET /api/scanner/top-movers stays as-is powering the Movers view — not removed, not rebuilt
